reasons: Franco can isolate a target with hook or suppression, giving Karina a clear burst target.
Karina can enter after Franco's catch to finish the target and look for reset pressure.

proof.summary: Franco creates a controlled single-target pick, and Karina follows with burst mobility to finish the isolated enemy.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches a squishy or weakened target.
Karina waits until the catch is confirmed.
Karina has cooldowns ready to continue after the kill.
failureCases: Franco misses or hooks a tank.
Karina enters before the target is controlled.
Enemy peel reaches Karina during the burst window.

reasons: Atlas can group enemies and create a multi-target entry window for Karina.
Karina benefits when Atlas lowers enemy movement options before she dives.

proof.summary: Atlas pulls enemies together, and Karina follows into the controlled area to burst weakened targets and continue reset pressure.
worksBestWhen: Karina enters after the control lands.
The team lowers enemy HP during the grouped window.
failureCases: Atlas catches only one durable target.
Karina enters before the engage connects.
Enemies survive the burst and collapse on Karina.

reasons: Tigreal can group and stun enemies, giving Karina a safer moment to enter after the fight starts.
Karina can follow Tigreal's engage to finish weakened targets instead of opening the fight alone.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls the enemy formation, and Karina uses the disrupted fight to enter on killable targets.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches priority targets or softens the backline.
Karina waits for enemy HP to drop before entering.
Tigreal remains close enough to peel after Karina dives.
failureCases: Karina enters too early and gets focused.
Enemy protection prevents Karina from finishing a target.

reasons: Angela can shield Karina during a deep burst commit.
Karina can use the protection window to survive long enough to finish a target and continue fighting.

proof.summary: Karina commits into dangerous space for a kill, while Angela can add shield support during that entry.
worksBestWhen: Angela casts Heartguard as Karina starts the dive.
Karina targets a low-HP or fragile enemy.
failureCases: Enemy burst breaks the shield before Karina finishes.
The target survives and Karina cannot continue pressure.

reasons: Vale can control and burst grouped enemies before Karina enters.
Karina benefits when Vale's magic damage lowers targets into a more reachable finish window.

proof.summary: Vale applies AoE control and burst, while Karina follows on damaged targets to secure kills and continue reset pressure.
worksBestWhen: Vale lands control or burst on grouped enemies.
Karina waits for HP bars to drop before diving.
The team has frontline pressure to protect the combo.
failureCases: Targets remain too healthy for Karina to finish.
Both heroes commit without frontline support and get collapsed on.
